creator: chrise@demon.net
text:
On Thu, Jan 25, 2001 at 10:15:25pm -0500, Pete Fritchman wrote:
> Works fine for me:
> electron [1509] % uname -a
> FreeBSD electron.databits.net 4.2-STABLE FreeBSD 4.2-STABLE #0: Tue Jan  2 21:13:25 EST 2001     root@electron.databits.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/ELECTRON  i386
> electron [1510] % cc -v
> Using builtin specs.
> gcc version 2.95.2 19991024 (release)
> electron [1511] % X -version
> 
> XFree86 Version 3.3.6 / X Window System
> (protocol Version 11, revision 0, vendor release 6300)
> Release Date: January 8 1999
> [snip other output]

Hrm. Doh.

chrise@ultrakill chrise> X -version

XFree86 Version 4.0.2 / X Window System
(protocol Version 11, revision 0, vendor release 6400)
Release Date: 18 December 2000

I have Mesa 3.2 in there, that built fine, whenever I made that, probably
a few months ago, but the latest xlockmore and xscreensaver appear to want
3.2.1..

Anything I should be looking at as to why this isn't working?
